name: Dialog Semiconductor Plc
description: Dialog Semiconductor Plc is a fabless semiconductor company that designs, develops, and markets highly integrated, mixed-signal integrated circuits (ICs) optimized for personal, portable, hand-held devices, low-energy short-range wireless, LED solid-state lighting, and automotive applications. The company provides power management, audio, and short-range wireless technologies, serving major global electronics manufacturers. Dialog Semiconductor was acquired by Renesas Electronics Corporation in August 2021.
